title: Rubber Tires
writer: Frank Condon, Tay Garnett, Zelda Sears
actors: Bessie Love, Erwin Connelly, Frank Coghlan Jr.
plot: The Stack family of New York City has fallen on difficult financial times. Pa Stack squandered the family's money by buying a home in Newhall, California, hoping that there would be oil on the land.
